title: NoSQL Database Types & Characteristics
description: A visual overview of the four main types of NoSQL databases and their key characteristics, showing how they differ from the relational model to handle Big Data.
relationships: Contrasts the flexible, schema-less data models of NoSQL types with the rigid, table-based structure of SQL
Shows how each NoSQL type is optimized for different data structures and query patterns (documents, simple pairs, columnar data, relationships)
